description: Style Notefootwear for men, from ESTD.1977, is designed in the studios of London and Milan to provide comfort to the fashion conscious man using the finest of handcrafted leathers and highest manufacturing techniques.  So pair this sandal with with your off-duty ensembles and look good from head-to-toe. Product DetailsBrown sandal with leather upper with thong style straps and a toe separatorMildly padded footbed with cool print branding on the heelTPU outsole with patterned grooves and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
